workflow_priorities.label: Warehouse
workflow_priorities.whyNow: Crucial exact-site validation target before tackling extreme cold modules.

workflow_priorities.label: Warehouse Club
workflow_priorities.whyNow: Tier 1 public_non_controlled site. No permission required. High robot workflow demand signal (inventory AMRs already deployed at Costco nationally).

workflow_priorities.label: Home Improvement
workflow_priorities.whyNow: Tier 1 public_non_controlled site. No permission required. Forklift-robot co-navigation is a high-demand robot workflow.

workflow_priorities.label: Grocery
workflow_priorities.whyNow: Tier 1 public_non_controlled site. No permission required. Shelf-scanning robots are the #1 deployed robot workflow nationally.

workflow_priorities.label: Superstore
workflow_priorities.whyNow: Tier 1 public_non_controlled site. No permission required. Walmart has deployed inventory AMRs nationally (Simbe, Bossa Nova).

priority_proof_targets.name: US Cold Storage - Ambient Module
priority_proof_targets.corridor: Initial ambient/cross-dock multi-tenant logistics space, avoiding deep-freeze limits.
priority_proof_targets.exactSiteValue: Crucial exact-site validation target before tackling extreme cold modules.

priority_proof_targets.name: McClellan Park - Building 775 (Light Industrial)
priority_proof_targets.corridor: Light industrial/warehouse module at McClellan Park, ambient temperature, single-tenant.
priority_proof_targets.workflowFit: forklift path planning and inventory navigation
priority_proof_targets.exactSiteValue: Simpler consent path than US Cold Storage (single-tenant). Adjacent to defense zones but not overlapping.

priority_proof_targets.name: Sacramento Costco - Natomas
priority_proof_targets.corridor: Warehouse club with wide aisles, high ceilings, pallet inventory on floor. Public walk-in access.
priority_proof_targets.workflowFit: inventory robot aisle navigation and stock audit
priority_proof_targets.exactSiteValue: Tier 1 public_non_controlled site. No permission required. High robot workflow demand signal (inventory AMRs already deployed at Costco nationally).

priority_proof_targets.name: Home Depot - Sacramento (Cal Expo)
priority_proof_targets.corridor: Large home improvement store with wide aisles, forklift traffic zones, pallet racking. Public walk-in access.
priority_proof_targets.workflowFit: forklift + robot co-navigation, pallet movement, inventory
priority_proof_targets.exactSiteValue: Tier 1 public_non_controlled site. No permission required. Forklift-robot co-navigation is a high-demand robot workflow.

priority_proof_targets.name: Safeway - Alhambra Blvd
priority_proof_targets.corridor: Standard grocery store with shelf aisles, good lighting, regular geometry. Public walk-in access.
priority_proof_targets.workflowFit: shelf-scanning robot navigation and stock audit
priority_proof_targets.exactSiteValue: Tier 1 public_non_controlled site. No permission required. Shelf-scanning robots are the #1 deployed robot workflow nationally.

priority_proof_targets.name: Walmart Supercenter - Natomas
priority_proof_targets.corridor: Large big-box retail with wide aisles, grocery section, and back-of-house warehouse zone. Public walk-in access.
priority_proof_targets.workflowFit: AMR inventory robots, aisle navigation, stock audit
priority_proof_targets.exactSiteValue: Tier 1 public_non_controlled site. No permission required. Walmart has deployed inventory AMRs nationally (Simbe, Bossa Nova).

priority_proof_targets.name: Arden Fair Mall - Common Areas
priority_proof_targets.corridor: Regional shopping mall common areas with wide corridors, good lighting. Public walk-in access.
priority_proof_targets.workflowFit: cleaning/monitoring robot floor patrol and wayfinding
priority_proof_targets.exactSiteValue: Tier 2 public_non_controlled site. No permission required for common areas. Cleaning robots are an emerging robot workflow.
